classification: protocol-preserving implementation repair; not a scientific-gate failure and not an R4 method change

trigger.failure_point: first backward before optimizer step, metric, or checkpoint
trigger.exception: upsample_bicubic2d_aa_backward_out_cuda does not have a deterministic implementation

diagnosis.direct_do_resize_false_is_forbidden: It changes the grid to [1,64,64] and pixel_values to [4096,1536], increasing visual tokens by 16x.

locked_repair.forward: the same torchvision bicubic-antialias operator on CUDA in the decoded tensor's original dtype
locked_repair.backward: the adjoint of the same linear resize operator replayed in FP32 on single-thread CPU and returned to the source device/dtype
locked_repair.legacy_native_reference: R3-R0 alone runs three isolated legacy native CUDA backward references with no model weights, optimizer, or scientific metric; the candidate remains strict and strict determinism must be restored after every reference

unchanged: Reader output resolution, patch grid, visual token count, and forward pixel values
listwise choice loss and joint continuation tokenization
DreamLite recurrence, LoRA, optimizer, seeds, data, presentations, and stopping thresholds
strict deterministic algorithms and math-only SDPA for DL-S
forbidden: warn_only or disabling deterministic algorithms in candidate, training, or scientific paths; only the preregistered isolated R3-R0 legacy-native reference may temporarily disable it and must restore it
nearest, area, bilinear, or other forward filter changes
feeding the unresized 1024 image to Qwen
reusing any failed or passed historical stage as replacement-commit evidence

r3_r0_acceptance.inspire_execution_binding: exact clean commit, formal-preflight SHA, worker_input SHA, H200 and pinned Torch/CUDA/Torchvision/Transformers

cache_rule: Existing teacher caches may be retained only after the train-only R3-TC0 gate verifies every artifact SHA and every cached decoded image has legacy/candidate pixel-grid bitwise identity. Any changed cached tensor requires a prospective rebuild amendment before teacher-assisted results. The default-attention cache versus strict-math training feature backend must then pass R3-TF0 before T0/calibration.

teacher_feature_backend_gate.depends_on: R3-TC0 on the same clean replacement commit
teacher_feature_backend_gate.unlock_scope: teacher T0, teacher-loss calibration, and teacher-assisted tracks only

unlock_rule: Only a clean replacement commit with a fresh exact-commit H200 preflight and all six gates passing may establish C0 and unlock Set8. Set8 and Transition16 still precede every pilot.
